creator: jaapb@kerguelen.org
text:
If the tcl/tk bindings are selected for ocaml, ocamlduce doesn't compile, because the C flags in Makefile.config are not quoted.

Fix: patch (to the port Makefile) attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: install ocaml with the tcl/tk bindings, try to compile lang/ocamlduce
